heart_applicable.description: False when STEMI on ECG, hemodynamic instability, or another condition bypasses the HEART Score. True when the HEART Score is applicable.

history_score.description: HEART History component. 0 = slightly suspicious (clearly non-ACS pattern), 1 = moderately suspicious (mixed features), 2 = highly suspicious (typical ACS features).

ecg_score.description: HEART ECG component. 0 = normal, 1 = nonspecific repolarization disturbance, 2 = significant ST deviation suggestive of ischemia.

age_score.description: HEART Age component. 0 = under 45, 1 = 45 to 64, 2 = 65 or older.

risk_factor_score.description: HEART Risk Factor component. 0 = no recognized risk factors, 1 = 1 to 2 recognized risk factors, 2 = 3 or more risk factors or any known atherosclerotic disease.

troponin_score.description: HEART Troponin component. 0 = at or below upper limit of normal, 1 = above upper limit of normal up to 3 times upper limit of normal, 2 = greater than 3 times upper limit of normal.

total_heart_score.description: Sum of all five HEART components (History + ECG + Age + Risk Factors + Troponin).

risk_tier.description: Low (score 0-3), moderate (score 4-6), high (score 7-10), or not_applicable when heart_applicable is false.

recommended_disposition.description: Recommended disposition based on risk tier. emergent_cath_lab only when heart_applicable is false due to STEMI or hemodynamic instability.

safety_flags.description: List of safety concerns. Examples: troponin_2_with_low_total, pending_troponin, incomplete_serial_troponins. Empty array if no safety concerns.

key_missing_information.description: Clinically relevant missing data. Examples: troponin_result, serial_troponins, prior_ecg_for_comparison. Empty array if nothing missing.

clinician_rationale.description: Brief explanation of the score assignment and disposition reasoning.
